HGSS.070.0000:
Hm? That’s a Pokédex, isn’t it?
May I see it?\f
There are so many kinds of Pokémon.
Hm? What’s this?\f
What is this Pokémon?
It looks like the strange writing on the\r
walls of the ruins.\f
If those drawings are really Pokémon,
there should be many more.\f
I know! Let me upgrade your Pokédex.
Follow me.\f
HGSS.070.0002:
Are you OK?
I was in a hurry and...\r
Sorry, did I hurt you?\f
HGSS.070.0003:
No way!
Could it be a Pokémon from Sinnoh...\r
The one they call ARCEUS...?\f
HGSS.070.0004:
Oh, could it be...?
ARCEUS causing all this...?\f
I cannot explain it any other way...\f
HGSS.070.0005:
ARCEUS may be the key to solving the
mystery of the UNOWN and the\r
Ruins of Alph...?\f
HGSS.070.0006:
Can you come to the Ruins of Alph with
me? Please! You must!\f
I am trembling with excitement.
I think something is about to happen!\f
HGSS.070.0007:
Ruins of Alph.\f
Visitors who are interested in
archaeology are welcome.
HGSS.070.0008:
Ruins of Alph.\f
Feel free to explore the ruins and
become a fossil professor!
HGSS.070.0010:
This is a mysterious hall.
Please watch your step.
